source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 把老百姓关切的事一件一件办好
topics.official_english: Addressing People's Concerns One by One
topics.why_hot: Reflects government's commitment to public welfare, resonates widely.
topics.share_angle: How China's leadership prioritizes grassroots issues.

topics.chinese_topic: 机票销量暴涨1240% 来中国避暑火了

topics.share_angle: China's tourism recovery and global interest.

topics.chinese_topic: 中国经济正在悄悄转型
topics.why_hot: Economic shift from manufacturing to high-tech and services.
topics.share_angle: Key trends in China's economic restructuring.

topics.chinese_topic: 重庆发生山体垮塌 有人员被埋
topics.official_english: Landslide in Chongqing Buries People, Rescue Underway
topics.why_hot: Natural disaster with potential casualties, public concern.
topics.share_angle: Emergency response and geological risks in mountainous areas.

topics.chinese_topic: 国内芯片龙头办公室遭韩国检方搜查

topics.why_hot: High-stakes tech rivalry and legal cross-border issues.

topics.chinese_topic: 气象台不敢报40℃？权威回应

topics.chinese_topic: 外露式、半隐藏门把手“集体回归”

topics.share_angle: Why carmakers are ditching flush handles.

topics.why_hot: Viral misinformation causes public panic, authorities clarify.
